name: Product Discovery Pack
description: Clarify ambiguous ideas, refine product direction, and produce implementation-ready specs before coding begins.
useCases: Turn ambiguous product ideas into crisp problem statements, users, goals, and non-goals before coding starts.
Prepare implementation-ready specs with scope, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and open questions for local agents.
Compare solution options and trade-offs so Codex or Claude Code can pursue the smallest valuable path.
Break discovery notes into sequenced engineering tasks that preserve product intent across implementation.
examplePrompts: Interview me about this feature idea, then produce a concise problem statement, target users, goals, non-goals, and risks.
Turn these notes into an implementation-ready spec with acceptance criteria, edge cases, dependencies, and open questions.
Compare three viable solution approaches for this product problem and recommend the smallest useful first release.
Create a coding-agent task plan from this discovery brief, keeping scope tight and preserving unresolved product decisions.
